content:
´I Live My Life For You´
Firehouse


[Verse]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
You know you're everything to me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
And I could never see, the two of us apart[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
And you know I give myself to you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
And no matter what you do, I promise you my heart[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
I've built my world around you and I want you to know[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
I need you, like I've never needed anyone before[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]         
I live my life for you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
I want to be by your side in everything that you do[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
And if there's only one thing you can believe is true[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I live my life for you[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch] 
I dedicate my life to you[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]                                     [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
You know that I would die for you, but our love would last forever[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch] 
And I will always be with you[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]                                 [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
And there is nothing we can't do, as long as we're together[/tab]


[Chorus]
